title: L.O.L. Surprise! Crafts for Kids Art Set Lol Doll 40+ Pieces Set Colouring Pencils Felt Tip Pens for Children Art Supplies LOL Gifts for Girls (Multicolor)
features: Keep your little one entertained and encourage their creativity with this LOL Surprise art case for girls. It's brimming full with all the art supplies they could need to provide hours of creative fun and exploration. A must-have for any LOL Doll fan!

The contents of these craft kits for kids include: 12 watercolour paint discs, 10 colouring sheets, 8 colouring pens for kids, 8 coloured pencils for kids, 8 crayons, 1 HB pencil, 1 eraser, 1 pencil sharpener, 1 paint brush, 1 sponge

Looking for LOL Doll merchandise for kids? These art sets for children are officially licensed by LOL Surprise! and include everything needed to create drawings and paintings and experiment with new techniques

These kids colouring sets are ideal for learning and development as they provide all the tools to experiment with different techniques, colours and textures. All stored neatly in a 3 tiered carry case
Looking for LOL gifts for girls? This cool art set for kids makes a great gift for Christmas, birthdays or special occasions and is sure to go down a treat with any young LOL Doll fan!
description: Product Description Get Your Kids Excited About Art Experience the Magic of Art with LOL Surprise! Your One-Stop Destination for All Things Artistic These LOL Surprise art sets include coloured markers, perfect for creating more intricate work. They're easy to use and the ink flows smoothly, making it easy for children to draw lines and shapes. The colours included in the pack are bright and bold, perfect for creating eye-catching artwork. An Amazing Collection of Colours and Art Supplies The watercolour paints included in these kids art sets for girls are perfect for children who want to experiment with mixing colours. The set comes with a range of watercolour paint discs and a paintbrush, allowing children to blend colours and create unique shades. Explore Their Artistic Side A Must-Have for Kids Who Love to Draw and Paint Art is an essential aspect of children's development and helps foster creativity, imagination, and self-expression. Therefore, providing children with the right tools to explore their artistic skills is essential. This LOL Surprise colouring set for kids is perfect for parents who want to nurture their child's artistic skills. The set includes crayons, felt tip pens, watercolour paints, colouring pencils, and more, providing children with a wide range of materials to create fun artwork. Let Them Explore Their Imagination A Great Way to Keep Kids Engaged and Creative With its wide range of colours and materials, these childrens art sets provide endless opportunities for creativity and fun. The durable carry case also means it's easy to take on the go and makes a great travel crafts set for kids. It's ideal for taking to friends' houses or with them on holiday and will keep them endlessly entertained. The Perfect Gift for Budding Artists The video showcases the product in use.
